basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Kanpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE, The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as IIT, IISc, IISER etc.
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE. The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as IIT, IISc, IISER etc.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Kanpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE. The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as IIT, IISc, IISER etc.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests like CSIR-UGC NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus 18% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve offline and/or online interviews.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position at the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The official website of the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is www.iitk.ac.in.
